name: Trip
description: Minimalist Map Tracker and Trip Planner
compose:
name: slashnode-trip
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/itskovacs/trip:1.45.2
    container_name: trip
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - fastapi
      - run
      - /app/trip/main.py
      - '--host'
      - 0.0.0.0
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/app/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8980:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-trip_app_data-app
